ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Average incidence rate for the cancer type */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Average prevalence rate for the cancer type */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Average survival rate for the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registries" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registry */,
  "registry_name" TEXT /* Name of the registry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the registry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the registry */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date when the registry was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last data update */,
  "number_of_patients_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of patients registered in the registry */,
  "data_collection_methods" TEXT /* Methods used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, disabled) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the registry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the registry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or dataset accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_registry_id FOREIGN KEY ("registry_id") REFERENCES registries ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
